chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5338 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case. 20.12.2024 Mr. Muzaffar Ali Dehraj, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Kafil Ahmed Abbasi, Additional Advocate General Sindh. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that he would be satisfied if the respondents would consider his application for appointment of shaheed quota in accordance with law. Learned AAG states that he has no cavil to the aforesaid and any application filed shall be decided expeditiously preferably within two week. Petition stands disposed of as aforesaid. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
